data_text_secret_base.inc.SecretBase_Text_AllDecorationsWillBeRetu: All decorations and furniture in your\nSECRET BASE will be returned to your PC.\pIs that okay?
data_text_secret_base.inc.SecretBase_Text_WantToRegisterSecretBase: Do you want to register\n{STR_VAR_1}'s SECRET BASE?
data_text_secret_base.inc.SecretBase_Text_AlreadyRegisteredDelete: This data is already registered.\nWould you like to delete it?
data_text_secret_base.inc.SecretBase_Text_TooManyBasesDeleteSome: Up to 10 locations can be registered.\pDelete a location if you want to\nregister another location.
data_text_secret_base.inc.SecretBase_Text_WhatWouldYouLikeToDo: What would you like to do?
data_text_secret_base.inc.SecretBase_Text_RegistryInfo: The registered SECRET BASE will remain\nunless the owner moves away.\pIf it is removed from the registry,\nanother SECRET BASE may take its place.\pUp to ten locations can be registered.{PAUSE_UNTIL_PRESS}
data_text_secret_base.inc.SecretBase_Text_BattleTowerShield: A shield of {STR_VAR_2} that marks winning\n{STR_VAR_1} times in a row at the BATTLE TOWER.
data_text_secret_base.inc.SecretBase_Text_ToyTV: A realistic toy TV. It could be easily\nmistaken for the real thing.
data_text_secret_base.inc.SecretBase_Text_SeedotTV: A toy TV shaped like a SEEDOT.\nIt looks ready to roll away on its own...
data_text_secret_base.inc.SecretBase_Text_SkittyTV: A toy TV shaped like a SKITTY.\nIt looks ready to stroll away...
data_text_secret_base.inc.UnknownString_81A3C71: You may only make one SECRET BASE.\pWould you like to move from the SECRET\nBASE near {STR_VAR_1}?
data_text_secret_base.inc.UnknownString_81A3CC9: Moving completed.\pWould you like to use the SECRET POWER?
